title: Comfort Pro Pure Fabric Conditioner, Hypoallergenic, Dermatologically Tested, Long-Lasting Softness & Fresh Scent, Ideal for Sensitive Skin, 2 x 4.8 L
features: Hypoallergenic & Dermatologically Tested – Gentle and safe, this fabric conditioner is specially designed for sensitive skin, reducing irritation while providing lasting softness
Long-Lasting Fresh Scent – Keep your clothes, linens, and towels smelling fresh for longer with the delicate fragrance of Comfort Pro Pure
Ideal for Delicate Fabrics – Perfect for everyday laundry, including delicate items like uniforms, linens, and baby clothes, ensuring fabrics stay soft and comfortable
Large Value Pack – 2 x 4.8L – Enjoy cost savings with our bulk 2 x 5L bottles, providing enough fabric conditioner for numerous loads, ideal for family or commercial use
Softens & Protects Fibres – Comfort Pro Pure ensures long-lasting softness, leaving fabrics feeling smooth and protecting them from wear and tear
description: Product description Comfort Pro Formula Pure is a very soft fabric conditioner that promises kindness on the most delicate and sensitive skin. It will leave linens, towels and uniforms beautifully soft and gentle next to the skin. It is hypoallergenic and dermatologically tested and gives fabrics a long lasting softness and delicate perfume. Manufacturer Contact Information Diversey Ltd, Weston Favell Centre, Northampton, NN3 8PD, United Kingdom.
